message:
test(events): add comprehensive tests for logger replay and query functions

Increases coverage from 59.3% to 79.8% (+20.5%) by adding tests for:
- DefaultOptions
- Since, SinceByType, EventCount, LastEvent
- Replay, ReplaySession
- Edge cases: disabled logger, empty file, nonexistent file, malformed entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
